title: SMPCore
description: A control plugin for Minecraft SMP servers
body:
# SMPCore

[smpcore.com](https://smpcore.com/)

SMP Core is a powerful and fully configurable control plugin designed to simplify the creation and management of Minecraft smp servers.

It provides server owners with complete control over world behavior, enchantments, items, and crafting systems.

### Global Server Settings
- Disable access to the Nether or End dimensions
- One mace: When enabled, only one mace can exist on the server

### World-Based Explosion Control
Configure explosion behavior separately for each world.
- Supported explosion types: End Crystals, Respawn Anchors, Beds, TNT Minecarts
- When disabled, the explosion is canceled, and the explosive item is safely dropped instead
- Each world can have completely different explosion rules.

### Enchantment Control
Fully manage enchantments on your server
- Disable Specific Enchantments
- Prevent certain enchants from being obtained via anvils or enchanting tables
- Automatically remove disabled enchants if obtained via commands, plugins, or creative mode
- Enchantment Level Limits: set maximum levels for specific enchantments

### Item Control System
Advanced item restriction and limit management.
- Completely block specific items
- Players cannot obtain, craft, use or keep disabled items
- Automatically removes illegally obtained items
- Item amount limits: set maximum item amounts per player

### Potion Type Control System
Advanced potion type restriction and limit management.
- Completely block specific potiontypes
- Players cannot obtain, brew, use or keep disabled items
- Automatically removes illegally obtained potions
- Potion type amount limits: set maximum potion type amounts per player

### Custom Crafting Recipes
- Enable/Disable these crafting recipes: Enchanted Golden Apple, Easy Golden Apple, Easy Anvil
- Each recipe can be individually toggled in the config.
- The entire crafting module can also be globally enabled or disabled.

### Fully Configurable
- All systems can be controlled in the config.yml.
- Each feature can be enabled or disabled independently.


### Support the project
SMP Core is completely free. If you enjoy using it and want to support development, you can donate here
- [Donation Link](https://ko-fi.com/ametiszt)
